outputCard.title: {{wiki}} Wikitext
outputCard.description: Review the result, then copy or save it — Perseus never publishes for you.

chunkWorkspace.title: Translate
chunkWorkspace.description: Translate each chunk below with the built-in LLM, or copy it into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any other AI and paste the reply back — or type a translation by hand. Every chunk works the same way no matter who translates it.
chunkWorkspace.pastePlaceholder: Paste the translated reply here, or type a translation by hand…
chunkWorkspace.missingSegments: {{count}} segment(s) in this chunk couldn't be matched — check the pasted text.

updateDialog.title: A new version of Perseus is available

errors.parsing: The article could not be parsed. {{message}}
errors.linkResolution: Could not resolve article links via Wikidata. {{message}}
errors.merge: Could not merge the translation back into the article. {{message}}
errors.generation: Could not generate the final Wikitext. {{message}}
errors.provider: The translation provider reported an error. {{message}}
errors.unexpected: Something unexpected went wrong. Please try again.
